layers.name: Project Midas BVR(I)
layers.description: Deep multicolor photometry from the legacy Midas survey (~5,749 stars). Plate X/Y offsets included.

layers.name: Jones & Prosser (1996)
layers.description: Proper-motion membership from photographic astrometry. Shown: 224 non-zero membership codes with ICRS coordinates.

layers.name: Gaia DR3 field
layers.description: All Gaia DR3 sources with G < 18 in a 0.35° cone (2,541 stars). Sample of 900 shown.

layers.name: Gaia DR3 cluster candidates
layers.description: Parallax-selected cluster candidates (1.5–3.2 mas, G < 17) — proxy for Cantat-Gaudin-style membership until full cross-match.

published.name: Cantat-Gaudin / Gaia DR2
published.note: Probabilistic members (UPMASK). Full table not bundled — use Gaia member layer as preview.

published.name: Malofeeva et al. (2023)
published.note: IR-excess binary-sensitive sample. Ingest planned in research pipeline.

published.name: WOCS light curves
published.note: V-band time series + RV binaries from Meibom et al.
